title: Normal respawning for Overly-Realistic
description: An addon for Overly-Realistic to make death more vanilla-like
body:
This is an addon project for [Overly-Realistic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wilos-overly-realistic) that makes death and respawning more vanilla-like: players don't get downed, players are able to respawn normally, beds can set spawn points, and the death screen is re-enabled

If Overly-Realistic isn't installed, this project won't do anything, make sure you have both!

This addon requires Overly-Realistic version v1.3.1 or above to work!
